title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara
jsonLd.description:
Puravankara has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
